name: WireGuard
description: Fast, modern WireGuard VPN with a web UI for managing peers (wg-easy). Sign in with username 'admin' and the password you configure here. One-time setup: after your first login, open Admin Panel > Interface and set Port to 51820 so the tunnel matches the published port. VPN access itself is secured by WireGuard keys.

ports.name: wg-easy_51820
ports.review_note: WireGuard sends no response before a valid Noise handshake, so it cannot be used for UDP reflection/amplification. Non-amplifiable. Reviewed 2026-06.

value.title: Admin password
value.description: Password for the wg-easy web UI (username: admin). Applied on first start only; change it later from the UI itself.
